overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a tropical coastal trail, transitioning through beach vegetation, and wading into shallow ocean waters. The scene features lush tropical environments, palm trees, and reveals a massive mechanical Tallneck structure in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested coastal trail between cliff and ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the coastline, scanning the environment ahead

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff covered with greenery rising on the left side of the path
tall palm trees lining the right side of the trail near the ocean
rocky dirt trail winding through the tropical forest
dense green bushes and ferns covering the cliff base
distant view of the ocean visible through gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by a rocky cliff on the left and palm trees on the right. The path winds through dense tropical vegetation with occasional glimpses of the ocean horizon through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal vegetation transition zone leading to open beach

events.description: exiting the forested trail into more open beach vegetation with clearer ocean views

agents.ego_description: moving downhill through dense tropical ferns and bushes toward the sandy shoreline

entered.detail: sandy shoreline becoming visible ahead through the vegetation
distinctive red-leaved plants growing along the right side of the path
large green ferns flanking the path as it approaches the beach

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the character descends through coastal vegetation toward the beach. The rocky cliff falls behind while sandy shores and the ocean become visible ahead. Crimson plants and large ferns line the final approach to the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with distant mountain views

events.description: character steps from sand into shallow turquoise ocean water
massive mechanical Tallneck structure becomes visible in the distance across the water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water along the beach, approaching the shoreline with the large mechanical structure in view

entered.detail: clear turquoise shallow water with visible sandy bottom and gentle waves
massive mechanical giraffe-like structure standing in the water in the distance
mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible across the bay

segments.scene_description: The character wades into the shallow turquoise ocean water along the sandy beach. The scene opens to reveal a vast coastal landscape with snow-capped mountains in the distance and a massive mechanical Tallneck structure standing prominently in the water across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded tropical trail that gradually opens into a vast, panoramic coastal vista. It begins by following the character along a narrow dirt path tucked between a rocky cliff and dense palm trees, where the ocean is only visible in brief glimpses through the foliage. As the character descends, the cliffside recedes and the vegetation shifts toward crimson plants and large ferns, signaling the transition toward the open shoreline. The scene then expands as the character wades into shallow turquoise waters, revealing a wide sandy beach. Finally, the horizon opens fully to showcase snow-capped mountains and a massive mechanical Tallneck structure standing prominently across the bay.
